text:
# Education

## Illinois Institute of Technology

Master of Science in Computer Science, Chicago, Illinois.

Years attended: 2024-2026.

Current GPA: Ongoing and to be updated.

Coursework includes Advanced Database Organization, Big Data, Advanced Computer Security, Cloud Computing, Machine Learning, and Internet Technologies.

Technical focus areas include AI systems, full-stack engineering, distributed systems, cloud and backend development, and multi-agent AI.

Research interests include agentic AI systems, retrieval-augmented generation, AI automation workflows, and intelligent orchestration systems.

Graduate projects include TechFusion AI Tutor, GovAid Finder, Insurance Premium Predictor, Jarvis Voice Assistant, and a Chrome Autofill Extension.

Sumit's major technical growth during graduate study was transitioning from student-level development to scalable AI engineering and full-stack architecture design.

## Ajeenkya D Y Patil University

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering.

Years attended: 2020-2024.

GPA: 3.2.
